Operation 'driveGroupsAll' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal and lacks context. Added explanation of pagination support, return value structure, and domain context about what drive groups are. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose, pagination mechanism, and how to use the response data.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all drive groups with pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all drive groups in the cloud storage service. Supports cursor-based pagination via the cursor and limit parameters. Returns an array of drive group objects with metadata including pagination cursors for navigating through results. A drive group is a logical grouping of drives used to organize and manage drives in the cloud storage service.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and lacks context. Added explanation of pagination support, return value structure, and domain context about what drive groups are. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose, pagination mechanism, and how to use the response data.

message: Operation 'driveGroupsAdd' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks essential details about inputs, outputs, and effects. Enhanced version clarifies what the operation accepts, what it returns (including ID and timestamps), the purpose of the created resource, and support for custom mappings. This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and how to handle the response.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new drive group in the cloud storage service. Accepts a drive group object with configuration details. Returns the newly created drive group object with a unique identifier and timestamps. The created drive group can be used to logically group and manage multiple drives. Supports custom mappings via the pass_through property for service-specific configurations.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks essential details about inputs, outputs, and effects. Enhanced version clarifies what the operation accepts, what it returns (including ID and timestamps), the purpose of the created resource, and support for custom mappings. This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and how to handle the response.

message: Operation 'driveGroupsOne' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is too terse and doesn't explain what information is returned or when an AI agent should use this operation. Enhanced version specifies the required input (ID), the complete response structure, and provides context about typical use cases. data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific drive group by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single drive group by its unique identifier. Returns the complete drive group object including its configuration, associated metadata, and timestamps. Use this operation to fetch details about a specific drive group for inspection or to verify its current state before performing updates or deletions.
data.reasoning: Original description is too terse and doesn't explain what information is returned or when an AI agent should use this operation. message: Operation 'driveGroupsUpdate' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks clarity about inputs, partial update support, and outputs. data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing drive group identified by its unique ID. Accepts a drive group object with fields to be modified. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be changed while other properties remain unchanged. Returns the updated drive group object with modified timestamps. Use this operation to modify drive group settings, name, or other configuration details.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about inputs, partial update support, and outputs. message: Operation 'driveGroupsDelete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is incomplete and doesn't convey the destructive nature of the operation or its side effects. Enhanced version clarifies the required ID parameter, emphasizes the permanent nature of deletion, specifies the response format, and warns about potential side effects regarding associated drives. This is critical for AI agents to understand the consequences of this operation before executing it.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete a drive group by ID
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a drive group identified by its unique ID. This operation permanently removes the drive group from the cloud storage service. Returns a confirmation response with the deleted drive group's ID. Note: Ensure the drive group is no longer needed before deletion, as this action cannot be undone. Associated drives may need to be reassigned or managed separately after deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete and doesn't convey the destructive nature of the operation or its side effects. Enhanced version clarifies the required ID parameter, emphasizes the permanent nature of deletion, specifies the response format, and warns about potential side effects regarding associated drives. This is critical for AI agents to understand the consequences of this operation before executing it.

message: Operation 'uploadSessionsDelete' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too minimal and lacks clarity about what happens when the session is aborted. Added details about session termination, data cleanup, and the effect on partial uploads to help AI agents understand the operation's consequences and when to use it.

data.current_description: Abort Upload Session. Note that the base URL is upload.apideck.com instead of unify.apideck.com. For more information on uploads, refer to the [file upload guide](/guides/file-upload).
data.description_suggestion: Aborts an active upload session and cancels any pending file uploads. This operation terminates the session identified by the provided ID, preventing further chunk uploads. Any partially uploaded file data associated with this session will be discarded. Note that the base URL is upload.apideck.com instead of unify.apideck.com. For more information on uploads, refer to the [file upload guide](/guides/file-upload).
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal and lacks clarity about what happens when the session is aborted. Added details about session termination, data cleanup, and the effect on partial uploads to help AI agents understand the operation's consequences and when to use it.

data.current_description: Finish Upload Session. Only call this endpoint after all File parts have been uploaded to [Upload part of File](#operation/uploadSessionsUpload). Note that the base URL is upload.apideck.com instead of unify.apideck.com. For more information on uploads, refer to the [file upload guide](/guides/file-upload).
data.description_suggestion: Completes an upload session and finalizes the file after all chunks have been uploaded. This operation must only be called after all file parts have been successfully uploaded via the upload part endpoint. Upon completion, the file is committed to storage and the session is closed. Returns confirmation of the finalized file. Note that the base URL is upload.apideck.com instead of unify.apideck.com. For more information on uploads, refer to the [file upload guide](/guides/file-upload).
data.reasoning: The current description lacks information about what happens after calling this endpoint and what is returned. Added details about file commitment, session closure, and return value to provide AI agents with a complete understanding of the operation's effects and outcomes.
